meme.title: Happy Birthday Molly... and you too Tim.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Kitty receives shocking news
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Markets React To: So love it lol
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Opinion: My cats would attempt murder if I did this to either of them (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
